card_description: Dr. Buck is a divine or mythological figure referenced in Philip K. Dick's Exegesis. Context: "Dick proposes a "holographic" or "fractal" model of divinity: just as a single cell contains the blueprint for the whole human, each human psyche contains the information to reconstitute the "macro proto-organism" (Christ/Vine)."
